series_metadata.series_description: Registry of cases from the counties that tracks incidentsof child abuse and neglect. Information is entered into FACSIS, Sacwis Families andChildren Services Information System. Registry includes principals involved in thecases, e.g. alleged perpetrators, victims and caretakers, SS#, driver’s licenseinformation, and protective service alerts.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office 5 years then destroy., Electronic: Erase
